    echo "Backend tests failed"
    exit 1
  fi
  if [ "success" != "success" ]; then
    echo "Backend formatting check failed"
    exit 1
  fi
  if [ "success" != "success" ]; then
    echo "Web formatting check failed"
    exit 1
  fi
  if [ "success" != "success" ]; then
    echo "Web tests failed"
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "All PR CI checks passed"
fi
shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
env:
  DOTNET_NOLOGO: true
  DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT: true
  GCP_REGION: europe-west2
  ARTIFACT_REGISTRY: europe-west2-docker.pkg.dev
  GCP_PROJECT_ID: acme-artefacts
  DOCKER_REGISTRY: europe-west2-docker.pkg.dev/acme-artefacts/acme-containers
  IMAGE_NAME: acme-api
  CI_ARTEFACTS_BUCKET: acme-ci-artefacts
##[endgroup]
Backend tests failed
##[error]Process completed with exit code 1.
